info.title: Hosaka Appliance
info.description: API for the Hosaka Field Terminal Pi. The `/api/v1/*` surface is the public, versioned contract that hosakactl (Mac/Linux client) and the kiosk SPA both consume. See the published reference at https://<your-gh-user>.github.io/Hosaka/ for static docs.

Run the Hosaka git pull / reinstall script in the background
post.description:
Same flow as the Python TUI `/update` — fires `scripts/update_hosaka.sh`.

Runs detached so the HTTP handler returns before services restart.

post.summary: Mint a short-lived OpenAI Realtime session token for the browser
post.description:
Delegate to OpenAI's ``POST /v1/realtime/sessions`` endpoint.

The real ``OPENAI_API_KEY`` stays on this process — the browser
only ever sees ``client_secret.value`` (valid for ~1 minute).

Queue a local voice-agent turn and return immediately with a job id

schema.description: ISO8601 UTC; only events newer than this
schema.title: Since

parameters.description: ISO8601 UTC; only events newer than this

parameters.name: expected

schema.description: Comma-separated feature_ids that should be alive. If omitted, we use every feature_id seen in the last 24h as the baseline.
schema.title: Expected

parameters.description: Comma-separated feature_ids that should be alive. If omitted, we use every feature_id seen in the last 24h as the baseline.

get.description: Return a small shape describing the local node's tailnet state.
Return the local beacon plus the last seen peer beacons.

post.summary: Tailscale Up
Tailscale Logout

get.description:
Return the list of tailnet peers with a `reachable` flag set to True
for those running Hosaka. The frontend uses this to populate the Nodes
panel; it also surfaces non-Hosaka peers so the user can see what else
is on their tailnet, but greys them out.

Same info as the tty1 dashboard, viewable from any browser on the LAN.

Auto-refreshes the JSON every 4 s. Has a "Switch to console mode" button
and a wifi add form so an operator with only a phone can fix connectivity.
Return LLM provider metadata (provider, model, base_url) — never the key.
Return persisted system config (hostname, backend endpoint, picoclaw toggle).

patch.description: Update system config fields — JSON body, all fields optional.

get.description: The VideoPanel polls this to pick up injected URLs.

post.summary: Video Inject
post.description: Terminal injects a video URL; the web panel picks it up on next poll.

post.summary: Chat
Gemini Alias
post.description:
Drop-in alias: the frontend calls /api/gemini; we route to local LLM.

Accepts both Gemini wire format ({contents: [...]}) and plain chat format
({messages: [...]}) so the same endpoint works for both the cloud SPA and
the appliance build.

post.summary: Save Identity
Save Backend
Save Picoclaw

path.title: Path
path.description: Relative path under docs root, .md auto-added.

EphemeralOut.title: EphemeralOut
EphemeralOut.description:
Subset of OpenAI's response, plus the tool schema echoed back.

Browser code only needs ``client_secret.value`` to open the WebRTC
peer connection; the rest is returned so the panel can show session
metadata in its debug drawer without a second round-trip.

tags.name: device health
tags.description: Hostname, uptime, services, mode, network, memory, temperature.

tags.name: console / device mode
tags.description: Switch the pi between console (server) and device (kiosk) modes.

tags.name: tailscale
tags.description: Tailnet status, peer list, magic DNS.

tags.name: wifi
tags.description: List networks, connect, forget. Backed by nmcli.

tags.name: event store
tags.description: 24-hour rolling SQLite event store. Every traced function, every command, every keystroke (opt-out) lands here. Read it to know what just happened.

tags.name: canary rollout
tags.description: Stage updates on the device that crashed first, then one ring device, then the fleet. Rollback is one command.

tags.name: crash bundle
tags.description: Build a redacted tarball with the last 30 minutes of events, system context, and (optionally) ship it to the triage relay over Tailscale.

tags.name: user manual
tags.description: The generated manual. Lowercase, terse, leads with the baller command.
